channel.title: 5g on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in 5g on Pi Stack

item.title: Open5GS vs free5GC vs srsRAN: Self-Hosted 5G Core Network Guide 2026
item.description: Building your own 5G core network used to require expensive telecom equipment and proprietary software. Today, three mature open-source projects make it possible to deploy a fully functional 5G core on commodity hardware or in the cloud. Whether you are a researcher testing network protocols, a hobbyist building a private mobile network, or an operator evaluating open-source alternatives to vendor lock-in, this guide compares the three leading options.
